summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Stevens Family PWA. All features working correctly - dashboard with clean crest (no letter), STEVENS typography, 9 sub-pages, theme toggle, navigation, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with family logo (clean crest, no letter inside)
STEVENS text displayed as hero typography identity
FAMILY text displayed below STEVENS
Tagline 'God First · Family Always' present
Dashboard grid with all 9 tiles visible
Footer with copyright present
All 9 sub-pages load correctly: /calendar, /photos, /upload, /dinner, /closet, /find-items, /recipes, /activities, /finance
Theme toggle (light/dark mode) works on dashboard
Theme toggle works on sub-pages
Dark mode persists across page navigation
Header with logo visible on all pages
Navigation dropdown opens and shows all 6 menu items
Back button on sub-pages navigates back to dashboard
Header logo click returns to dashboard
Dashboard tiles link to correct sub-pages
Mobile responsive layout works at 375px width
Theme toggle visible and functional on mobile
Navigation menu works on mobile
Tile navigation works on mobile
Back button works on mobile
PWA service worker registered successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Clean crest with no letter confirmed - SVG has no text elements. STEVENS typography is the primary identity. Google integration URLs are placeholders (expected 401/404 errors). Theme persists via localStorage. HashRouter used for navigation (/#/pagename).
notes: Console shows expected 401/404 errors for Google Calendar/Sheets/Drive placeholder URLs - this is expected behavior as noted in the review request.
